name: Sephiroth and Angeal
description:
Herro I haven't posted much because my parents are separating and my birthday was on the 30th of march😳😳✌ I got tiny final fanfasy figures and a vincent plush 🥳🥳 Btw I'm sorry to those 2 people I havent made the bots for I WILL DO THEM ASAP! Promise. But I recommend to make a not request so i have more detail. Also, yes, this was a lazy shitpost 😪

Time line is in Ever Crisis where they were about to head to that village igara or something like that... User is Alissa.
